---
title: "Cat-Cat Visualization"
output: 
  flexdashboard::flex_dashboard:
    orientation: columns
    vertical_layout: fill
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
library(flexdashboard)
```
```{r}
setwd("C:\\Users\\bella\\OneDrive\\UMass\\DACSS_690V\\HW_4")
```
```{r}
rm(list = ls())
library(readxl)
arrests <- read_excel("C:/Users/bella/OneDrive/UMass/DACSS_690V/HW_4/Mass_Arrests.xlsx")
sheet2 <- read_excel("C:/Users/bella/OneDrive/UMass/DACSS_690V/HW_4/Mass_Arrests.xlsx", sheet = 2)
```
```{r}
head(arrests)
```
```{r}
names(arrests)
```
```{r}
# checking data types
str(arrests,width = 50,strict.width='cut')
```
```{r}
unique(arrests$Race)
unique(arrests$`Arrest Type`)
unique(arrests$Sex)
```

```{r}
# contingency table of counts
# independent variable in the columns
# dependent variable in the rows
(ArrestTypeSex = table(arrests$Sex, arrests$`Arrest Type`))
```
```{r}
library(magrittr) # for %>%
(ArrestTypeSex_mgCol=prop.table(ArrestTypeSex,
                            margin = 2)%>%round(.,3))
```

```{r}
SexArrestType = table(arrests$Sex, arrests$`Arrest Type`)
SexArrestType_mgCol = prop.table(SexArrestType,
                            margin = 2) %>% round(., 3)
SexArrestType_mgCol


#making a data frame from the contingency table
ArrestTypeSexDF=as.data.frame(ArrestTypeSex)
names(ArrestTypeSexDF)=c("Sex","Arrest_Type","counts")

#adding marginal shares as percentages:
ArrestTypeSexDF$pctCol=100*as.data.frame(ArrestTypeSex_mgCol)[,3]
ArrestTypeSexDF

```

```{r}
library(ggplot2)
```

```{r}
# stacked bar chart
base3 = ggplot(data = ArrestTypeSexDF,
               aes(x = Arrest_Type, y = pctCol,
                   fill = reorder(Sex, pctCol)))

barStacked = base3 + geom_bar(stat = "identity", position = 'stack')

barStacked_annot = barStacked +
  geom_text(size = 4,
            color = ifelse(ArrestTypeSexDF$pctCol < 25, "white", "black"),
            position = position_stack(vjust = 0.5),
            aes(label = paste0(pctCol, '%')))

barStacked_final = barStacked_annot + scale_fill_viridis_d(option = "cividis") +
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(title = "Arrest Type Distribution by Sex",
       subtitle = "Massachusetts Arrest Data",
       x = "Arrest Type",
       y = "",
       fill = "Sex",
       caption = "Source: Mass Arrests Dataset") +
  theme(axis.text.y = element_blank())

barStacked_final
```

```{r}
library(vcd)
# chi-square test
chisq_test <- chisq.test(ArrestTypeSex)
cramers_v <- vcd::assocstats(ArrestTypeSex)$cramer

library(glue)
glue("
### Chi-square Test Results
**Test of independence**: Ď‡Â˛({chisq_test$parameter}) = {round(chisq_test$statistic, 1)}, p < {ifelse(chisq_test$p.value < 0.001, '0.001', round(chisq_test$p.value, 3))}
**Effect size**: CramĂ©r's V = {round(cramers_v, 3)}
")
```
